programme.title: Angry Planet | B.C. Caving
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canada’s West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we’ll witness George’s explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Thunder Down Under
programme.desc: Stormchasing developed in Australia in the same period – the 1990s – as it developed in the American Midwest. In the first week of December – the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Italia Wild
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption; both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Kenya
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Here’s the deal: Mt. Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Here’s the first kicker: High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave – a cave created by the most unique form of erosion – Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with their tusks in order to eat the salty rock. Here’s the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus – the world’s most deadly virus. So here’s the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they've lost, and how they've charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there's rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Ryan Nolan, a hardworking, talented play-maker with integrity and intelligence to match. Unfortunately, at only 5’ 9”, his size has kept him off of many coaches' radar. programme.title: Country Ball

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing - Lexus WSL Finals Fiji presented by Corona Cero 2025
programme.desc: After nine regular season events, the Lexus WSL Finals brings the top 5 men and top 5 women in professional surfing to Lower Trestles for a one-day, winner-take-all, showdown for the coveted title of World Champion. From Pipeline and Portugal to Teahupo'o and Cloudbreak, it has been a hard fought season for the world's best surfers. Ten surfers enter, and only two will emerge as Champions and add their name to the legacy of the sport.

programme.title: REPLAY | All the Action from the VIVO Rio Pro presented by Corona Cero 2025
programme.desc: The World Title race is set to supercharge in Saquarema. The passion of Brazil's surf fans, the electric atmosphere of Saquarema, and the pressure of the back half of the season are unmatched. It's loud. It's wild. It's must-watch professional surfing. Replay Final's Day as the World Title race continues in Brazil.

programme.title: REPLAY | All the Action from the Surf City El Salvador Pro 2025
programme.desc: Where the Pacific's perfect right-hand point break meets an unparalleled competition venue, the Surf City El Salvador Pro delivers an opportunity for CT athletes to earn critical points in the rankings ahead of the Mid-season Cut. Long, powerful walls offer endless opportunity for progressive maneuvers while the hollow sections demand split-second decision-making that can test even the most seasoned CT competitor. Replay all the action of Final's Day at Punta Roca.

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing: Western Australia Margaret River Pro 2025
programme.desc: The Western Australia Margaret River Pro is the 7th stop on the 2025 World Surf League Championship Tour, running from May 17 to May 27. This crucial event marks the mid-season decider, where the world's best surfers put it all on the line to advance through the next section of the tour. It is also the third and final stop of the GWM Aussie Treble. Margaret River will bring the action with pumping waves and strong competition.

programme.desc: It's been 50 years since Sarah 'Cindy' White set fire to the home of the family who hired her to babysit. programme.desc: A Neo-Nazi turned Islamic jihadist shoots two of his roommates after an argument. In a combative interview with Court TV journalist David Scott, Devon Arthurs, now claiming to be remorseful for sending two young men to an early grave, attempts to explain his descent into madness.

programme.title: Interview With A Killer: Once A Liar...
programme.desc: It's been 50 years since Sarah 'Cindy' White set fire to the home of the family who hired her to babysit. Now the longest serving inmate of the Indiana Women's Prison meets with Court TV journalist David Scott to share her remorse. Does her life sentence reflect justice or has her time in prison been long enough for reform?

programme.title: Interview With A Killer: Extreme Influence
programme.desc: A Neo-Nazi turned Islamic jihadist shoots two of his roommates after an argument. In a combative interview with Court TV journalist David Scott, Devon Arthurs, now claiming to be remorseful for sending two young men to an early grave, attempts to explain his descent into madness.

programme.desc: It's been 50 years since Sarah 'Cindy' White set fire to the home of the family who hired her to babysit. programme.title: Interview With A Killer: Once A Liar...
programme.desc: It's been 50 years since Sarah 'Cindy' White set fire to the home of the family who hired her to babysit. Now the longest serving inmate of the Indiana Women's Prison meets with Court TV journalist David Scott to share her remorse. Does her life sentence reflect justice or has her time in prison been long enough for reform?

programme.title: Interview With A Killer: Extreme Influence
programme.desc: A Neo-Nazi turned Islamic jihadist shoots two of his roommates after an argument. In a combative interview with Court TV journalist David Scott, Devon Arthurs, now claiming to be remorseful for sending two young men to an early grave, attempts to explain his descent into madness.
